name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES turn, state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Helper to get the set of processes *)
ProcSet == 1..N

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no turn assigned *)
Init == /\ turn = [i \in ProcSet |-> 0]
        /\ state = [i \in ProcSet |-> Idle]

(* Helper to find the process with the smallest non-zero ticket *)
MinTicket ==
  LET nonZeroTickets == {i \in ProcSet : turn[i] # 0}
  IN IF nonZeroTickets = {} THEN 0

          \A j \in nonZeroTickets : turn[m] <= turn[j]

(* Transition relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in ProcSet :
    \/ (* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
       (state[i] = Idle /\ turn' = [turn EXCEPT ![i] = MAXIMUM({1,2,...,N}) + 1] /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying])
    \/ (* Process i enters critical section if it has the smallest ticket *)
       (state[i] = Trying /\ 
        MinTicket = i /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Critical] /\ turn' = turn)
    \/ (* Process i exits critical section and releases its ticket *)
       (state[i] = Critical /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle] /\ turn' = [turn EXCEPT ![i] = 0])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, state>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == /\ turn \in [ProcSet -> Nat]
           /\ state \in [ProcSet -> {Idle, Trying, Critical}]

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Participants

(* Participants is a set of participant identifiers, e.g., {1,2,3} *)
ASSUME
    \A p \in Participants: p \in 1..N

VARIABLES state, votes, decision

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [Participants -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
          /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"Yes", "No", "None"}]
          /\ decision \in {"Commit", "Abort", "Pending"}

Init == /\ state = [p \in Participants |-> "Init"]
        /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "None"]
        /\ decision = "Pending"

Prepare(p) == /\ state[p] = "Init"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]

VoteYes(p) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
              /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]

VoteNo(p) == /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
             /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]

CommitAll == /\ decision = "Commit"
             /\ state' = [p \in Participants |-> "Committed"]

AbortAll == /\ decision = "Abort"
            /\ state' = [p \in Participants |-> "Aborted"]

DecideCommit == /\ decision = "Pending"
                /\ \A p \in Participants: votes[p] = "Yes"
                /\ decision' = "Commit"

DecideAbort == /\ decision = "Pending"
               /\ \E p \in Participants: votes[p] = "No"
               /\ decision' = "Abort"

Next ==
    \E p \in Participants:
        Prepare(p) \/ VoteYes(p) \/ VoteNo(p)
    \/ DecideCommit
    \/ DecideAbort
    \/ CommitAll
    \/ AbortAll

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State space: each philosopher can be in one of three states *)
TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking *)
Init == TypeOK /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper predicates for fork ownership *)
left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* A philosopher can eat if both adjacent forks are free *)
canEat(i) == state[left(i)] # "eating" /\ state[right(i)] # "eating"

(* Transition: philosopher i starts eating *)
pickUp(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Transition: philosopher i stops eating and starts thinking *)
putDown(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Transition: philosopher i becomes hungry (ready to eat) *)
think(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

(* Transition: philosopher i finishes eating and starts thinking *)
eat(i) == state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* One step of the system: any philosopher may act *)
Step ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
      (state[i] = "thinking" /\ think(i))
      \/ (state[i] = "hungry" /\ canEat(i) /\ pickUp(i))
      \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ putDown(i))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == Step

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Safety: no two adjacent philosophers eat simultaneously *)
NoDeadlock == \A i \in 1..N : ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[right(i)] = "eating")

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME Proc = 1..N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

maxNum == MAX(num)

nextNum(p) == IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE maxNum + 1

Next ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
    \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
    \/ flag[p] /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = nextNum(p)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices modulo K,
   size is the number of items in the queue. *)

Init == /\ q = <<>>
       /\ head = 0
       /\ tail = 0
       /\ size = 0

Producer ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1) \* produce a 1
  /\ tail' = (tail + 1) ~% K
  /\ size' = size + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED head

Consumer ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ q' = Tail(q) \* consume the first element
  /\ head' = (head + 1) ~% K
  /\ size' = size - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL

(* Server identifiers *)
Servers == 1..N

(* Majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Server states *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, hasn

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Transition: a server becomes a candidate *)
BecomeCandidate(s) ==
  /\ state[s] = "Follower"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![s] = currentTerm[s] + 1]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]

(* Transition: a server grants a vote if it hasn't voted in this term *)
GrantVote(candidate, voter) ==
  /\ state[voter] = "Follower"
  /\ votedFor[voter] = NULL
  /\ currentTerm[voter] = currentTerm[candidate]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![voter] = candidate]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Transition: a candidate becomes leader if it receives majority votes *)
BecomeLeader(candidate) ==
  LET votes == {s \in Servers : votedFor[s] = candidate}
  IN /\ state[candidate] = "Candidate"
     /\ Cardinality(votes) >= Majority
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![candidate] = "Leader"]
     /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* STRING server can transition to any state; this is a simplified model *)
Next ==
  \E s \in Servers :
    \E action \in {BecomeCandidate, GrantVote, BecomeLeader} :
      action(s)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Invariant: no two servers can be leaders in the same term *)
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in [Servers -> Nat]
           /\ votedFor \in [Servers -> (Servers \cup {NULL})]
           /\ state \in [Servers -> State]
           /\ \A t \in Nat : Cardinality({s \in Servers : state[s] = "Leader" /\ currentTerm[s] = t}) <= 1

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<0, .., 0>>  \* N zeros
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ readers[i] < 10
        /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ readers' = [readers EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ readers[i] > 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ readers' = [readers EXCEPT ![i] = @ - 1]
  \/ \A i \in 1..N : readers[i] = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  \/ writer_active = TRUE
        /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) *)

VARIABLES state, channel, recvd, snapshot, finished

(* state[p] is the local state of process p
   channel[(p,q)] is the sequence of messages in transit on channel (p,q)
   recvd[p] is the set of markers received by p
   snapshot[p] is TRUE iff p has recorded its state
   finished is the set of processes that have finished recording *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ recvd = [p \in Proc |-> {}]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]
        /\ finished = {}

SendMsg(p, q, m) ==
  channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, snapshot, finished>>

RecvMsg(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = state[p] + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<recvd, snapshot, finished>>

SendMarker(p, q) ==
  channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, snapshot, finished>>

RecvMarker(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])]
  /\ recvd' = [recvd EXCEPT ![p] = recvd[p] \cup {q}]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, finished>>

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, recvd, finished>>

Finish(p) ==
  /\ finished' = finished \cup {p}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, recvd, snapshot>>

Next ==
  \E p, q \in Proc :
    \/ SendMsg(p, q, 1)
    \/ RecvMsg(p, q)
    \/ SendMarker(p, q)
    \/ RecvMarker(p, q)
    \/ RecordState(p)
    \/ Finish(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recvd, snapshot, finished>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [Proc -> Nat]
  /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Nat)]
  /\ recvd \in [Proc -> SUBSET Proc]
  /\ snapshot \in [Proc -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ finished \in SUBSET Proc

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES token, sent

(* token: 1..N, the node currently holding the token *)
(* sent: set of nodes that have sent a message *)

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ sent = {}

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
          /\ sent' = IF token = i THEN sent \cup {i} ELSE sent

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE store

(* Helper: check that store is a function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

(* Action: Put(k, v) updates the store *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Action: Get(k) does not change the state *)
Get(k) == k \in Keys

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

(* Types *)
Acceptors == 1..N
Proposers == 1..M
Values == V

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES promised, accepted, decided
AcceptedValue(v) == \E a \in Acceptors : accepted[a].value = v
Decided(v) == decided[v]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ promised = [a \in Acceptors |-> 0]
    /\ accepted = [a \in Acceptors |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> CHOOSE(Values)]]
    /\ decided = [v \in Values |-> FALSE]

(* Proposer actions *)
Prepare(p, b) ==
    /\ b > promised[*]  (* proposer p chooses a ballot higher than any seen *)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, accepted, decided>>

Promise(a, p, b) ==
    /\ promised[a] = b
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, accepted, decided>>

Accept(p, b, v) ==
    /\ b = promised[*]
    /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, decided>>

Accepted(a, p, b) ==
    /\ accepted[a].ballot = b
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, accepted, decided>>

(* Decision action *)
Decide(v) ==
    /\ \A a \in Acceptors : accepted[a].value = v
    /\ decided' = [decided EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<promised, accepted>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E p \in Proposers :
        \E b \in Nat :
            \E v \in Values :
                Prepare(p, b) \/ Promise(p, p, b) \/ Accept(p, b, v) \/ Accepted(p, p, b) \/ Decide(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<promised, accepted, decided>>

(* Invariants *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ promised \in [Acceptors -> Nat]
    /\ accepted \in [Acceptors -> [ballot -> Nat, value -> Values]]
    /\ decided \in [Values -> BOOLEAN]

NoDuplicateDecisions ==
    \A v1, v2 \in Values : v1 # v2 => ~Decided(v1) \/ ~Decided(v2)

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
\* Import basic temporal logic
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* CONSTANTS
\*   MAX_RETRIES   -- maximum number of retransmission attempts per chunk
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VARIABLES
\*   sent      -- set of chunks that have been sent (including retransmissions)
\*   acked     -- set of chunks that have been acknowledged
\*   retries   -- mapping from chunk -> number of retransmission attempts
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES sent, acked, retries

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Helper definitions
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
ChunkSet == 1..10  \* assume file consists of 10 chunks

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Init: initial state
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ acked = {}
    /\ retries = [c \in ChunkSet |-> 0]

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Next: state transition relation
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E c \in ChunkSet :
        \* Send or retransmit chunk c
        /\ c \notin sent
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {c}
        /\ retries' = [retries EXCEPT ![c] = retries[c] + 1]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<acked>>

    \/ \* Acknowledgment arrives for a sent chunk
        \E c \in sent :
        /\ acked' = acked \cup {c}
        /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Specification: temporal formula
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retries>>

\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Invariant: no chunk is retransmitted more than MAX_RETRIES times
\* --------------------------------------------------------------------
TypeOK == \A c \in ChunkSet : retries[c] <= MAX_RETRIES

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Txns, Keys, Values
VARIABLES active, another, committed, db, reads, transaction, writes


(* Helper: check if a transaction has a pending write to a key *)
HasWrite(t, k) == k \in DOMAIN writes[t]

(* Helper: check if a transaction's write set intersects another's write set *)
WriteConflict(t1, t2) ==
    EXISTS k \in DOMAIN writes[t1] :
        k \in DOMAIN writes[t2]

(* Initial state: empty database, no active transactions, no snapshots, no writes, no commits *)
Init == /\ db = [k \in Keys |-> 0]   \* Assume 0 is a default value
        /\ active = {}
        /\ reads = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>]   \* Empty snapshots
        /\ writes = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>]  \* No tentative writes
        /\ committed = {}

(* Begin a new transaction: add to active set, capture snapshot of current db *)

             /\ active' = active \cup {t}
             /\ reads' = [reads EXCEPT ![t] = [k \in Keys |-> db[k]]]
             /\ writes' = writes
             /\ db' = db

(* Read operation: read from snapshot if not written locally, else from local write *)
Read(t, k) ==

        writes[t][k]

        reads[t][k]

(* Write operation: record tentative write *)
Write(t, k, v) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t][k] = v]
    /\ db' = db

(* Commit: check for write-write conflicts with other active transactions *)
Commit(t) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ \A t2 \in active \ {t} : ~WriteConflict(t, t2)
    /\ db' = [k \in Keys |-> IF k \in DOMAIN writes[t] THEN writes[t][k] ELSE db[k]]
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ reads' = reads
    /\ writes' = [w \in Txns \ {t} |-> writes[w]]
    /\ committed' = committed \cup {t}

(* Abort: discard tentative writes *)
Abort(t) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ writes' = [w \in Txns \ {t} |-> writes[w]]
    /\ db' = db
    /\ reads' = reads

(* Next-state relation: nondeterministic choice among Begin, Read, Write, Commit, Abort *)
Next ==
    \/ \E t \in Txns : Begin(t)
    \/ \E t \in Txns : \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Write(t, k, v)
    \/ \E t \in Txns : Commit(t)
    \/ \E t \in Txns : Abort(t)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<db, active, reads, writes, committed>>

(* Invariant: committed transactions never change after commit *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ active \subseteq Txns
          /\ reads \in [Txns -> [Keys -> Values]]
          /\ writes \in [Txns -> [Keys -> Values]]
          /\ committed \subseteq Txns

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

(* Variables: *)
VARIABLES clocks, offsets

(* Helper: ensure all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
WithinEpsilon(c) == \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(c[i] - c[j]) <= epsilon

(* Initial state: all clocks start at 0, offsets are 0 *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* One round of synchronization: each node updates its clock to the average of all clocks *)
SyncStep ==
  LET avg == (SUM i \in 1..N : clocks[i]) \div N IN
  /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg]
  /\ offsets' = offsets

(* The system evolves by either staying in the same state or performing a sync step *)
Next == SyncStep

(* Specification: initial state and evolution over time *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

(* Invariant: after each step, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
TypeOK == WithinEpsilon(clocks)

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* State space: flag is a function from {P1, P2} to BOOLEAN
   indicating whether a process is interested in entering the critical section.
   turn is either P1 or P2, indicating whose turn it is to enter. *)

Init == /\ flag = [p \in {P1, P2} |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn \in {P1, P2}

Next ==
  \E p \in {P1, P2} :
    \E q \in {P1, P2} :
      /\ q # p
      /\ (flag[p] = FALSE /\ flag[q] = TRUE /\ turn = p
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>)
      \/ (flag[p] = TRUE /\ flag[q] = FALSE /\ turn = q
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>)
      \/ (flag[p] = TRUE /\ flag[q] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = q
          /\ flag' = flag)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node is identified by an integer in 1..N *)
NodeSet == 1..N

(* State: for each node, a set of messages it knows *)
VARIABLES known

(* Initial state: each node knows only its own id *)
Init == known = [i \in NodeSet |-> {i}]

(* Helper: choose a random node to talk to *)
ChooseNode(i) == CHOOSE j \in NodeSet : j # i

(* One round of gossip: each node i picks a random partner j
   and both exchange their known sets (union) *)
Next ==
  /\ \E i \in NodeSet :
       \E j \in NodeSet : j # i
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = known[i] \cup known[j],
                                            ![j] = known[j] \cup known[i]]
          /\ \A k \in NodeSet \ {i, j} : known'[k] = known[k]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_known

(* Invariant: all known sets are subsets of the set of all node ids *)
TypeOK == \A i \in NodeSet : known[i] \subseteq NodeSet

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
CONSTANT Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c, p) == /\ p \in free
                 /\ free' = free \ {p}
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Release(c, p) == /\ p \in allocated[c]
                 /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                 /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next == \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
          Request(c, p) \/ Release(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers
VARIABLES inboxes, subscriptions


(* Message is a tuple <<topic, payload>> *)
Message == [topic: Topics, payload: STRING]

(* Initial state: no subscriptions, empty inboxes *)
Init ==
    /\ subscriptions = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ inboxes = [s \in Subscribers |-> <<>>]

(* Helper: deliver a message to all subscribers of a topic *)
Deliver(msg) ==
    LET subs == subscriptions[msg.t]
    IN  /\ \A s \in subs: inboxes[s] = Append(inboxes[s], msg)

(* Subscribe action: subscriber s subscribes to topic t *)
Subscribe(s, t) ==
    /\ s \in Subscribers
    /\ t \in Topics
    /\ subscriptions' = [subscriptions EXCEPT ![t] = @ \cup {s}]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

(* Publish action: a publisher posts a message on topic t *)
Publish(t, payload) ==
    /\ t \in Topics
    /\ Deliver([t |-> t, payload |-> payload])

Next ==
    \/ \E s \in Subscribers : \E t \in Topics : Subscribe(s, t)
    \/ \E t \in Topics : \E p \in STRING : Publish(t, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscriptions, inboxes>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* turn: either P1 or P2
   wants: a mapping from {P1, P2} to BOOLEAN indicating intent to enter CS *)

Init == /\ turn = P1
        /\ wants = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]

Next ==
    \E p \in {P1, P2} :
        LET q == CHOOSE r \in {P1, P2} : r # p IN
        \E action \in {"request", "enter", "exit"} :
            (* Request phase *)
            action = "request" /\ wants[p] = FALSE
            /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>
            \/ (* Enter critical section *)
            action = "enter" /\ wants[p] = TRUE
            /\ wants[q] = FALSE
            /\ turn = p
            /\ UNCHANGED <<wants>>
            \/ (* Exit critical section *)
            action = "exit" /\ wants[p] = TRUE
            /\ wants[q] = FALSE
            /\ turn' = q
            /\ UNCHANGED wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

(* Mutual exclusion: at most one process in critical section *)
MutualExclusion == \A p, q \in {P1, P2} :
                    p # q => ~(wants[p] /\ wants[q])

(* Liveness: if a process wants to enter, it eventually does *)
Liveness == \A p \in {P1, P2} :
              (wants[p] => <> (wants[p] /\ turn = p))

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {P1, P2}
          /\ wants \in [ {P1, P2} -> BOOLEAN ]

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Nodes

(* Each node has a vector of counters, one per node *)
VARIABLES counts, nodes

(* Helper: vector addition *)
VecAdd(v1, v2) == [i \in 1..N |-> v1[i] + v2[i]]

(* Helper: element-wise max of two vectors *)
VecMax(v1, v2) == [i \in 1..N |-> IF v1[i] > v2[i] THEN v1[i] ELSE v2[i]]

(* Helper: sum of a vector *)
VecSum(v) == CHOOSE s \in Nat : s = +/v

(* Initial state: all counters zero *)
Init == counts = [i \in Nodes |-> [j \in Nodes |-> 0]]

(* Increment at node i: increment its own slot *)
Inc(i) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i] = VecAdd(counts[i], [j \in Nodes |-> IF j = i THEN 1 ELSE 0])]

(* Merge state of node i with state of node j *)
Merge(i, j) ==
  /\ i \in Nodes /\ j \in Nodes
  /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i] = VecMax(counts[i], counts[j]),
                           ![j] = VecMax(counts[j], counts[i])]

(* Next-state relation: any node may increment or merge with any other node *)
Next ==
  \E i \in Nodes :
    (Inc(i) \/ \E j \in Nodes : Merge(i, j))

(* Total count is the sum of the maximum values across all nodes' vectors *)
Total == CHOOSE t \in Nat :
  t = +/({VecSum(counts[n]) : n \in Nodes})

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

(* Invariant: all counters are non-negative integers *)
TypeOK == \A n \in Nodes : \A m \in Nodes : counts[n][m] \in Nat
